text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I are on our way home from a
shrine, where she prayed for help getting out of a
rut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That was a nice change of pace, but... If a prayer
could fix everything, we'd all be champions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! Owww!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?! Show me where it hurts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I'm going to see if everything's okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober jogs over to the children and starts
treating the little girl's wound. Before long, the
girl brightens up again.

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Thank you, miss!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're welcome. Bye-bye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Off they go. I'm glad it wasn't anything
serious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about how my little brother
and sister will be their age soon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't see them much, so it's hard to picture what
they'll be like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
As their older sister, I can't let myself get tripped
up over something like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have to be a good role model for my siblings.
choice_data_list: You can do it. I believe in you.
You can do it. I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! That's not the kind of thing you say out
loud!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I don't think being the ideal sister is going
to be that easy, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's head back. I feel like going for a run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's head back. I feel like going for a run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober seems to be in much better spirits
after visiting the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I'm not even fit to be their older sister.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't even pull myself out of this rut...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is it all right if I go pray again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home from the shrine, Mejiro Dober
keeps sighing and remains in dismal spirits...
